description.text: This island should be a place to party and relax, instead our Heroes brought rockets. Created by Alpha. Two Cubes and a Base.

es.original: This island should be a place to party and relax, instead our Heroes brought rockets. Created by Alpha. Two Cubes and a Base.
es.translation:
Debería ser un lugar para relajarse... pero con cohetes y explosiones. Autor: Alpha.
Dos generadores y un núcleo.

pt.original: This island should be a place to party and relax, instead our Heroes brought rockets. Created by Alpha. Two Cubes and a Base.
pt.translation: Esta ilha deve ser um lugar de festa e relaxamento, mas em vez disso os nossos heróis trouxeram foguetes. Criado por Alpha. Dois Cubos e uma Base.

de.original: This island should be a place to party and relax, instead our Heroes brought rockets. Created by Alpha. Two Cubes and a Base.
de.translation: Anstatt Ferien zu machen packen unsere Helden auf dieser Insel lieber die Wummen aus. Von Alpha. Zwei Generatoren und eine Basis.

ru.original: This island should be a place to party and relax, instead our Heroes brought rockets. Created by Alpha. Two Cubes and a Base.
ru.translation: Этот остров должен быть местом для отдыха и вечеринок, но наши герои притащили ракеты. Создано Alpha. Два куба и база.

fr.original: This island should be a place to party and relax, instead our Heroes brought rockets. Created by Alpha. Two Cubes and a Base.
fr.translation: Cette île aurait pu être un coin de paradis, mais nos héros ont décidé d'y poser leurs lance-roquettes. Créée par Alpha. Deux cubes et une base.
